title: Matera Brings Digital Twin to U.S. Financial Institutions
excerpt: Digital Twin is a light ledger that enables real-time transaction authorizations and balance updates 24X7 for DDAs and other financial accounts.
body: Digital Twin is a light ledger that enables real-time transaction authorizations and balance updates 24X7 for DDAs and other financial accounts. Microsoft and Avanade tested Digital Twin and found impressive transaction processing volumes. More information in this [press release](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20230905921873/en/Matera-Brings-Proven-Highly-Scalable-Digital-Ledger-to-US-Financial-Institutions-Enabling-Modernization-Without-Risk).
